untranslatable_reason: Signal requires PDI (Plus Directional Indicator) and MDI (Minus Directional Indicator) which are not in the allowed indicators list. Only ADX_14 is available. Additionally, the signal specifies 2-day periods for all indicators, but only ADX_14 (14-period) is provided in the allowed set. The PDI > MDI condition and ADX smoothing comparison cannot be accurately expressed without access to the directional indicator components.
translation_notes: This signal combines directional movement indicators (PDI/MDI) with ADX trend strength. The core logic is: enter when directional movement is positive (PDI > MDI) OR when ADX is above its smoothing, and exit on the reverse. Without PDI and MDI indicators available, and with only 14-period ADX instead of 2-period, the signal cannot be reliably translated. A workaround using only ADX would lose the directional component of the strategy.
